description_long: This induction cooker features a rectangular, box-like form with a slightly raised cooking surface on top. The main body is smooth and solid, with a smaller rectangular section protruding from one side, likely housing controls or additional components. The top surface appears to be a single, flat cooking zone, bordered by a subtle lip or edge. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible buttons, knobs, or digital displays on any side. The exterior is a uniform light gray, suggesting a metal or plastic finish. There are no visible brand markings, power cords, or decorative elements.
description: A minimalist, rectangular induction cooker with a single flat cooking surface and a small side extension, finished in light gray.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main rectangular body with a slightly raised top surface and no visible controls.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the protruding smaller section on the right, likely for controls or housing.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the smaller rectangular extension and the main body, with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the main body and the side extension on the left, maintaining a smooth, featureless surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel appears to be integrated into the smaller side extension, but no distinct buttons, knobs, or touch areas are visible. The surface is smooth and unmarked, with no labels, icons, or indicator lights present.
